title: Auto Trade Cycling
description: An automated trade cycling based on the trade cycling mod
body:
This is a mod to find good enchantment books by pressing **D**.

This mod depends on [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling) mod 

This mod allows us to flash the trade of librarians. While we are flashing the trade of librarians, we may miss some good price trades with good enchantment due to a misclick. In this way, I provide a tool to flash trades automatically (hotkey D), and it won't flash trades when we meet the good price enchantment books. If we don't need this book, we can flash again with C (the hotkey of Trade Cycling).
